title: EnhancedVelocity
body:
[![image](https://i.imgur.com/jdUK2Lg.png)](https://github.com/Syrent/EnhancedVelocity)   
[![image](https://i.imgur.com/ovEjF5S.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/velocityreport)   
[![image](https://i.imgur.com/J9wNr1T.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/velocityvanish) 
[![image](https://i.imgur.com/B4jL8Hr.png)](https://discord.gg/SW3NeujBmh)
   
## Easy to install
You can upgrade your Velocity server just by dragging EnhancedVelocity plugin into your Velocity plugins folder.
## Feature packed
EnhancedVelocity supports every plugin to make your server ecosystem complete like VelocityVanish, VelocityReport, SayanChat, and etc...
## Quality support
You're able to [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/VZk2XU3kFg) and get help very quickly, up to instantly.
## Up to date
The plugin is not abandoned. It is constantly getting updated to fix reported bugs and get new optimizations that can help it run as smoothly as possible, whilst still doing what you want it to do.
## High performance
Unlike other plugins where "high performance" often means your CPU usage will be high, EnhancedVelocity doesn't do anything to pressure your network load.
